generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T LOBELIA SYPHILITICA. [This plant was introduced into the Materia Medica by Dr Hering, under the name of Lobelia crulea, but though the latter is certainly a more pleasing name, yet it rested upon no authority, having never been described under that name; besides Lobelia crulea, B. M., grows at the Cape of Good Hope, was figured in Bot. Mag., 2701, and may yet be proved. -T. F. Allen.] Lobelia syphilitica, Linn. Natural order , Lobeliaceæ. Common name , Great Blue Lobelia. Preparation , Tincture of the plant. Authorities. (Hering's provings, Hahn. Month., 6, p. 520). 1 , proving of Dr. Williamson, 10 drops of 2d dil., twice a day, for three days; 2 , Dr. J. Jeanes took 5 drops of 2d dil. in water; 3 , J. W. B. took "4/5 without result, next day 4/5-3;" a week later, 5th dil.; 4 , Neidhard, 5 drops of 1/10th, at 4 P.M., first day, 10 drops, morning and evening, second day; and subsequently 10 drops of 1/10th. MIND. ► Frequent mistakes in spelling and writing (with confused feeling and slight aching in the head), (after fifteen minutes), [2] . HEAD. ► Confusion. ► Confused feeling, with slight aching in the head, immediately; with frequent mistakes in spelling and writing (after fifteen minutes), [2] . ► Dizziness, particularly in moving about, lasting three hours (after five minutes), [4] . ► General Head. ► General aching through the head, [3] . ► Headache, continuing till daylight (sixth night), [1] . ► Headache, after dinner (sixth day), [1] . ► Forehead. ► Dull pain in the forehead, over the eyes, increased by reading and writing; the pain less severe than the day previous (one hour and a half after first dose, second day), [4] . ► Dull, aching pain in the forehead, over the eyes, principally over the root of the nose, in the centre, soon; lasting, with slight intermissions, until evening (first day), [4] . ► Oppression in the forehead over eyes (after five minutes), [4] . ► Temples. [10.] ► Pain in both mastoid processes, first felt and worst in the right one, in the afternoon (first day), [1] . ► Acute pain along the fronto-temporal suture of the right side (second and third days), [1] . ► Stitching pain in the left temple (after thirty minutes), [2] . ► Parietals. ► Pain on the left side of the head, over the coronal suture (half an hour after first dose and after second dose, first day), [1] . ► Pain in left parietal protuberance (after one hour), [3] . EYE. ► Heaviness over the eyes, like a weight, but no pain (fifteen minutes after first dose, second day), [4] . ► Burning in right eye, with a tear (after thirty-one minutes), [2] . ► Slight aching over eyes, particularly left eye (ten minutes after second dose, second day), [4] . ► Itching of internal canthus of left eye (after sixteen minutes), [2] . ► Itching in external canthus (after thirty-three minutes), [2] . [20.] ► Smarting itching of the internal canthus of the left eye (second and third days), [1] . ► Orbit. ► Boring pain in the right orbit (fifth day), [1] . ► Drawing sensation under the right eye; in the afternoon (first day), [1] . ► Lids. ► Feeling of a foreign body under the right upper lid, with smarting and burning (after forty-five minutes), [2] . ► Oppression over the eyelids, and slight drowsiness (after first dose, second day), [4] . ► Soreness of the tarsi of the right eyelid (after forty minutes), [2] . ► Ball. ► Soreness of the eyeballs from turning them (fifth day), [1] . EAR. ► Pain in left ear (after thirty-four minutes), [2] . ► Continued itching in the left ear, about the posterior edge of the meatus (after ten minutes), [2] . NOSE. ► Frequent sneezing, with severe and painful jarring in the breast and larynx; the latter feels as if it were stretched almost to bursting, with copious discharge of thick mucus from both nostrils, at sunset (after thirty-seven hours), [2] . [30.] ► Painful irritation of both sides of the cartilaginous portion of the septum nasi; worse immediately behind the columna nasi; sensitive to the cool air (second day), [1] . ► Itching and tingling feeling in the left nostril, as if about to sneeze (after seven minutes), [2] . FACE. ► Flushed face, with heat, when lying down (fifth day), [3] . ► Face flushed, and headache after dinner, with drowsiness and lassitude, but inability to sleep when lying down; somewhat better going into the open air (sixth day), [1] . ► Sensation of dropping under the left cheek-bone, in the afternoon (first day), [1] . ► Drawing pain in the right cheek-bone (sixth day), [1] . ► Perfect dryness of the lips, and a feeling of dryness and sensitiveness of the nostrils, so that the inhalation of air of a moderate temperature (supposed 60°) creates a painful feeling (after two hours, also second day), [2] . ► Pain in the right maxillary joint, and in the middle of the right lung, in the afternoon (first day), [1] . MOUTH. ► Frequent shooting pains through the teeth on the right side (she is subject to these pains), (first day), [4] . ► Bleeding of the gums, with putrid taste (fifth day), [1] . [40.] ► A renewed secretion of thick mucus, apparently on the superior surface of the palate, renewed by snuffling and hawking; with still further diminution of the soreness of the throat (after thirty-six hours), [2] . ► Dryness of the left half of the palate (half an hour after first dose, first day), [1] . ► Constrictive feeling of the skin of mouth and tongue, especially at left commissure of the jaws; in ten minutes afterwards, towards the root of the tongue, [2] . ► The astringent feeling in left side of the mouth, though abated after the mucous secretion at noon, still continued (after eleven hours), [2] . ► Great soreness, rawness, pricking, dryness of the lower surface of the palate (after forty minutes); extending forward through the whole mouth (after forty-five minutes); abated after the mucous secretion at noon, but still continued (after eleven hours), [2] . THROAT. ► Objective. ► Increased secretion of mucus from the throat, (ten minutes after second dose, second day), [4] . ► Thick mucous secretion in throat, with diminution of the very unpleasant feeling of constriction, rawness, dryness, and soreness of throat (after sixty minutes), [2] . ► Subjective. ► Dryness of the throat, with the sensation as if the pharynx was open like a funnel (second and third days), [1] . ► Pain in region of right tonsil (after sixteen minutes), [2] . ► Pain in the region of the left tonsil, immediately, [2] . [50.] ► Sensation of a lump in the upper portion of the sophagus (half an hour after first dose, first day), [1] . STOMACH. ► Eructation and Hiccough. ► (Acid eructations from 5 to 6 P.M.), (first day), [1] . ► Waterbrash, at 8 A.M. (fourth day), [1] . ► Hiccough (half an hour after first dose, first day), [1] . ► Stomach. ► I suffered from dyspepsia thirteen years ago, and my suffering now are of the same kind; they are temporarily relieved by drinking cold water (fifth day), [1] . ► Sinking feeling in stomach, followed by borborygmi below the epigastrium (after twenty-one minutes), [2] . ► Slight pain in region of the pylorus (after fifty-five minutes), [2] . ► Awoke at 6 A.M., with violent pain in stomach, and pain and borborygmus in bowels, followed by copious watery stools, with tenesmus and soreness in the anus; had four similar attacks during the day, and they became so violent that I took Pod. pelt. twice, which arrested the diarrha, and the pain gradually subsided during the evening; but the pain in the stomach with sensation of distension increased, with hunger (fourth day), [1] . ► The jolting of an easy carriage gives pain in the stomach and both hypochondria (fifth day), [1] . ABDOMEN. ► Objective. ► Borborygmi just below the epigastrium, most after dinner, for hours (second day), [2] . [60.] ► Borborygmi in lower part of abdomen, towards the right side (after twenty-five, twenty-nine, and thirty-two minutes), [2] . ► Woke at 3 A.M. with flatulency, but inability to pass it from the bowels (fourth day), [1] . ► Subjective. ► Pains in the abdomen, most below the umbilicus, followed by diarrhal stools, in the afternoon and evening (second day), [2] . ► Stitching-drawing pain in left anterior lumbar region of abdomen (after twenty-one minutes), [2] . STOOL. ► Three loose evacuations from the bowels (second and third days), [1] . ► Ineffectual effort at stool, but free evacuations of tasteless wind on rising from bed (fourth morning), [1] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Itching and smarting in the forepart of the urethra (after forty-five minutes), [2] . ► Increased quantity of urine, with free discharge (second and third days), [1] . ► A small quantity of urine, which he is obliged to retain for some time, causes pain in the bladder; when evacuated, of a deep amber color; at noon (second day), [2] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Much tickling about the top of the larynx, with disposition to hacking cough, in the evening (after thirty-nine hours), [2] . [70.] ► Morning hoarseness connected with the state of the stomach (sixth day), [1] . ► Dyspeptic cough originating in the stomach (sixth day), [1] . ► Slight mucous expectoration, in the evening (second day), [2] . CHEST. ► Pain in the middle of the right lung and in the right maxillary joint, in the afternoon (first day), [1] . ► Pain just anterior to the cartilaginous margin of the short ribs (after one hour and a half), [3] . ► Pain between shoulders and neck, both sides (after fifty minutes), [2] . ► Aching pain in the cartilage of the sixth left rib (after twenty-two minutes), [2] . ► Rheumatic pain along the right collar-bone, in the evening (fifth day), [1] . ► Pain about the junction of sixth right rib with its sternal cartilage (in five minutes), [2] . ► Pain in left side of chest near the axilla, with aching in the left shoulder and arm (after twenty-eight minutes), [2] . ► Mammæ. [80.] ► Pain under the left breast (sixth day), [1] . ► Severe and painful jarring in the breast and larynx; the latter feels as if stretched almost to bursting; with frequent sneezing; at sunset (after thirty-seven hours), [2] . HEART. ► Pain in regio cordis in seven hours, about sunset severe, [2] . NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Stiffness of the nape (worse on left side) from looking up (fifth day), [1] . ► Slight aching pain from the back of the head down the nape of the neck (first day), [4] . ► Back. ► Pain in the back, [4] . ► Pain, heavy, aching, in the back under the false ribs, worse at night after lying down in bed, and increased to a cutting pain by deep inspiration, and aggravated by turning in bed; pathogenetic, third and fourth nights, and in the days, but less, [2] . ► Cutting pains in the back under the false ribs, cutting forwards and upwards; did not notice the pain after going to bed, [3] . ► Stitching pain in right back, passing from eight rib downwards (after fifty minutes), [2] . ► Dorsal. ► Pain on the inside edge of the right scapula (after ten hours), [2] . [90.] ► Pain, acute sticking, in eighth dorsal vertebra (after fifty minutes), [2] . ► Lumbar. ► Pain in the region of the left kidney (after twelve minutes), [2] . ► Stitch pain in region of right kidney (after thirty-two minutes), [2] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Aching, very considerable, of the right shoulder and fingers, whilst writing (after fifteen minutes), [2] . ► Heavy pain in the radial muscles of the left arm (half an hour after first dose); in the same part of right arm (after second dose, first day), [1] . ► Stiff numb feeling in the palm of the right hand (after twenty-nine minutes), [2] . ► Sticking pain in the left thumb, fleshy part of the last phalanx (after twenty minutes), [2] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Hip. ► Pain in both hips, occasionally (after twenty minutes and after several hours), [2] . ► Knee. ► Sensation of coldness, as if from the weather, with aching, in both knees through the day (fifth day), [1] . ► Leg. ► Pain in the lower part of the right tibia and in right ankle (after sixty-five minutes), [2] . [100.] ► Stitching pain in left tibia (after forty-five minutes), [2] . ► Ankle. ► Rheumatic pain over the right inner ankle (fifth day), [1] . ► Foot. ► Pain in the upper part of the left heel (after two hours), [2] . ► Pricking or stinging in the soles of both feet; sensation as if asleep, [4] . ► Toes. ► Pain in the fleshy part of the last phalanx of great toe, left (after twenty-three minutes), [2] . ► Sore pain in the joints of the left big toe (sixth day), [1] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Lassitude, after dinner (sixth day), [1] . ► Transient pain over the left kidney, and soon afterwards in the left hypochondrium (half an hour after first dose, first day), [1] . SKIN. ► (Itching here and there on the skin, worse than usual), (first day), [2] . SLEEP. ► Drowsiness but inability to sleep, when lying down after dinner (sixth day), [1] . [110.] ► Slight drowsiness, and oppression over the eyelids (after first dose, second day), [4] . ► Restless sleep, with frequent wakings through the night (sixth night), [1] . FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Cold sensation, as if alcohol had been spilled on the outer portion of the left thigh (eighth day), [1] . ► Coldness of hands and heat of forehead (after twenty minutes), [2] . ► Heat. ► Flashing of heat in the back, shoulders, and face, with burning of ears (after forty-five minutes), [2] . ► Heat of forehead and coldness of hands (after twenty minutes), [2] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Night ), Headache; after lying down in bed, pain in back. ► ( After dinner ), Headache; face flushed, etc.; borborygmi; lassitude. ► ( Drinking cold water ), Dyspeptic sufferings. ► ( Lying down ), Flushed face, etc. ► ( Moving about ), Dizziness. ► ( Reading ), Pain in forehead. ► ( Writing ), Pain in forehead. ► Amelioration. ► ( Open air ), Face flushed, etc. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main

Clinical: Acidity; Adenoids; Asthma; Back, pains in; Borborygmi; Cartilages, pains in; Catarrh; Coryza; Cough; Dyspepsia; Eustachian catarrh; Flatulence; Hay-fever; Influenza; Kidneys, pains in; Lumbago; Melancholia; Post-nasal catarrh; Pylorus, pain in; Sciatica; Spine, pains in; Spleen, affections of; Stomach cough; Throat, sore

In l. ear: pain; continued itching about posterior edge of meatus. Larynx feels stretched almost to bursting. Much tickling about top of larynx with disposition to hacking cough, evening. Morning hoarseness from state of stomach. Dyspeptic stomach cough. Slight mucous expectoration, evening. Dry, hacking cough of four weeks' duration, day and night, with pain r. side about junction of sixth rib with its cartilage, of a year's duration; dryness of back of throat. Severe aching of shoulder and fingers, whilst writing. Heavy pain in radial muscles of l. arm; later in same of r. Stiff, numb feeling in r. palm. Sticking pain in l. thumb, fleshy part of last phalanx. Pain in both hips, occasionally. Sensation of coldness, as if from the weather, with aching, in both knees through the day. Stitching pain in l. tibia. Rheumatic pain over r. inner ankle. Pain in upper part of l. heel. Pricking stinging sensation as if asleep, in both soles. Pain in fleshy part of last phalanx of l. great toe; sore pain in its joints. Lassitude, after dinner. Transient pain over l. kidney, and soon after in l. hypochondrium.

keynotes.text: The symptoms of the Lob. syph. proving, whilst in many points analogous to those of the other Lobelias, do not bring out the emetic properties of Lob. inflata. There is, however, epigastric sinking, flatulence, dyspepsia, and diarrhœa. Lob. card., Lob. inf., and Lob. syph. all have a milky juice. Hale quotes Rafinesque as saying that the analysis of Lob. syph. shows it to contain Silex, Iron, and Muriate and Phosphate of Lime. The marked action of Lob. syph. on the posterior nares led Cooper to use it with success in cases of deafness arising from an "unhealthy, soft, swollen, easily bleeding catarrhal" condition of the naso-pharynx. This is emphasised by another symptom: "Dull aching pain in centre of forehead, over root of nose." Cooper (who uses an acetic preparation) considers that with this, as well as with the Inflata, a history of suppression is a leading indication. There are many notable symptoms in the back, back of chest, and about the lower ribs. Some of these led Jeanes (the first prover) to make a very fine cure of melancholia in an educated, intelligent man, of which these were the characteristics: "Great depression of spirits; unhappy state of mind, always associated with pain about and under short ribs in back on left side, extending outward nearly to left side posterior aspect of region of spleen." In the proving there was this: Pain on inside of right scapula. Farrington adds this: "Pain under (not below) inner border of left scapula, after weeping." The pains of Lob. syph. travel about, from right to left; from left tonsil to right; from back down legs; from eighth rib downward; aching from back of head down nape. Then there are frequent synalgias: Pain in right maxillary joint, with pain in middle of right lung; pain in breast and larynx; pain in left side of chest near axilla, with aching in left shoulder and arm. Touch (soreness of ischium). Motion . Deep inspiration . Drinking cold water > (temporarily) gastric symptoms. Mental exertion (mental state). Reading and writing pain in forehead. Internal nose painfully sensitive to cool air. Inhaling moderately cool air . Flushing after dinner > somewhat in open air. Symptoms after dinner. At night. Secretion of thick mucus > throat soreness.

_raw: Compare: Other Lobelias; Puls. (mental depression and weeping); Chel. and Ranunc. (scapular pains); Hydrast. (postnasal catarrh); Cean. (spleen). Lob. i. has one-sided coating of tongue. Lob. s. has left half of palate dry. Pod. relieved the diarrhœa of Lob. s., but not the acute abdominal pains.

mental_emotional.text: Frequent mistakes in spelling and writing (with confused feeling and slight aching in head (after 15 min.). Depressed, temper unhappy; with pain in posterior aspect of spleen. Brain weakness, exertion of mind intolerable; seemed as if he would go wild.

head.text: Dizziness moving about. Headache continuing till daylight. Headache, after dinner. Dull pain in forehead over eyes (and esp. over root of nose), reading and writing. Pain in both mastoid processes; first and in r. Acute pain along r. fronto-temporal suture. Stitching pain in l. temple. Pain in l. parietal protuberance.

eyes.text: Heaviness over eyes, like a weight, but no pain; with drowsiness. Burning in r. eye with a tear. Itching of l. internal canthus; in external canthus. Boring pain in r. orbit. Drawing sensation under r. eye, afternoon. Feeling of foreign body under r. upper lid with smarting and burning. Soreness of r. tarsi. Soreness of eyeballs from turning them.

nose.text: Frequent sneezing with severe and painful jarring in breast and larynx; larynx feels stretched almost to bursting, with copious discharge of thick mucus from both nostrils, at sunset. Painful irritation of both sides of cartilaginous septum; immediately behind the columna nasi; sensitive to cool air. Itching and tingling in l. nostril as if about to sneeze. (Postnasal catarrh.).

face.text: Flushed face, with heat, when lying down. Face flushed and headache after dinner, with drowsiness and lassitude, but inability to sleep when lying down; > open air. Sensation of dropping under l. cheekbone, afternoon. Drawing pain in r. cheekbone. Perfect dryness of lips, and a feeling of dryness and sensitiveness of nostrils so that inhalation of air of moderate temperature (60°) = a painful feeling. Pain in r. jaw-joint and in middle of r. lung, afternoon.

mouth_throat.text: Frequent shooting pains through r. teeth. Bleeding of gums with putrid taste. A renewed secretion of thick mucus, apparently on inferior surface of palate, renewed by snuffing and hawking, with still further diminution of throat soreness. Dryness of l. half of palate. Constrictive feeling of skin of mouth and tongue, esp. at l. commissure of jaws; ten minutes later towards root of tongue. Great soreness, rawness, pricking, dryness of lower surface of palate; extending forward through mouth; > by secretion of mucus and at noon, but still continued. Increased secretion of mucus. Thick mucous secretion in throat with > of constricting rawness, dryness, and soreness. Dryness of throat with sensation as if pharynx was open like a funnel. Pain in region of l. tonsil (immediately); of r. tonsil (after 16 minutes). Sensation of a lump in upper part of œsophagus.

stomach_abdomen.text: (Acid eructations 5 to 6 a.m.). Water-brash 8 a.m. Dyspepsia uniformly > by drinking cold water. Sinking in stomach followed by borborygmi below epigastrium. Slight pain in region of pylorus. Awoke 6 a.m. with violent pain in stomach and pain and borborygmus in bowels, followed by copious watery stools with tenesmus and soreness of anus; four attacks one day increasing in violence, colic and diarrhœa > by Podoph., but the pain in stomach with sense of distension increased, with hunger. Jolting of an easy carriage = pain in stomach and both hypochondria. Borborygmi: below epigastrium after dinner; in lower abdomen towards r. side. Woke 3 a.m. with flatulence but inability to pass it. Pains in abdomen, most below umbilicus, followed by diarrhœa, afternoon and evening.

stool_rectum.text: Copious watery stools with tenesmus and soreness of anus. Loose stools. Ineffectual effort at stool, but free evacuation of tasteless wind on rising from bed.

urinary.text: Itching and smarting in fore part of urethra. Increased quantity of urine with free discharge. A small quantity of water, which he is obliged to retain for some time, = pain in bladder; when evacuated, of deep amber colour.

chest_heart.text: Pain middle r. lung and r. jaw-joint. Pain just anterior to cartilaginous margin of short ribs. Pain between shoulders and neck both sides. Aching pain in cartilage of sixth l. rib. Rheumatic pain along r. clavicle. Pain along juncture of sixth r. rib with its cartilage. Pain in l. chest near axilla with aching in l. shoulder and arm. Oppression in lower chest as if breath did not reach there; distress in region of heart and audible "knocking" respiration (like sound of chopping wood); pain under short ribs and dry cough. Pain under l. breast. Severe and painful jarring in breast and larynx; larynx feels stretched to bursting, frequent sneezing; at sunset. Severe pain in region of heart about sunset.

back.text: Stiffness of nape ( l. side) from looking up. Slight aching pain from back of head down nape. Pain, heavy, aching, in back under false ribs, night after lying down in bed, increased to cutting pain by deep inspiration, and turning in bed; less during the day. Cutting under false ribs forward and upward (not noticed after going to bed). Stitching pain in r. back passing from eighth rib downward. Pain on inside edge r. scapula. Pain, acute, sticking, in eighth dorsal vertebra; by least movement and deep inspiration. Pain and aching in posterior aspect of region of spleen. Pain in region of l. kidney; stitch in r. Pain commencing r. side small of back, then going down to os ischium, very sore to touch. Great rigidity of spine, least motion exceedingly painful; pain goes from r. to l. side of back and shoots down leg.

skin.text: (Itching here and there on skin, worse than usual.).

sleep.text: Drowsy but unable to sleep, when lying down after dinner. Slight drowsiness and oppression over eyelids. Restless sleep with frequent wakings through the night.

fever_chill.text: Cold sensation as if alcohol had been spilled on outer l. thigh. Cold hands, hot forehead. Feeling of heat in back, shoulders, face, with burning of ears. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
